item_spec.concrete_change:
Add a first-class top-K coverage-budget (sampling) dispatch mode, and represent the resulting partial coverage HONESTLY by reusing the existing scope-mode machinery in synthesis (the 'delta' scope branch at synthesis.ts:299-305 is the exact template — it already emits a partial notice plus 'A full audit is advised before release.'). Changes:

(1) packages/audit-code/src/cli/dispatch.ts: add a coverage budget read from sessionConfig (e.g. sessionConfig.dispatch?.max_packets, or coverage_budget/sample_top_k). Packets are already priority-ordered (orderTasksForPacketReview/buildReviewPackets), so when the budget K is set and K < packet count, emit only the top-K packets into the dispatch-plan and record the DEFERRED packets/task_ids and the budget in ActiveDispatchState / dispatch metadata (so synthesis can report them). Default (no budget) = emit all packets, exactly today. Compose cleanly with the FINDING-008 canary (canary first, then fan out up to the budget) and FINDING-002 wave sizing (budget caps total packets; waves still size by quota).

(2) packages/audit-code/src/orchestrator/nextStep.ts: ensure the dispatch-driving obligation (audit_tasks_completed) is SATISFIABLE under the budget — when sampling is active and the top-K packets are complete, the run must be allowed to advance to synthesis rather than looping forever to dispatch the remainder. If the obligation's satisfaction predicate lives outside nextStep.ts (obligation derivation), wire the budget signal so 'top-K complete' counts as satisfied-for-budget; note this cross-reference for the implement phase. Do not change PRIORITY order.

(3) packages/audit-code/src/reporting/synthesis.ts: add a scope mode (e.g. 'sample'/'budget') alongside 'delta'. In the '## Scope and Coverage' section emit an honest partial-coverage notice: state that the run audited the top-K of N packets/units by risk, LIST the units/files that were not audited (from the deferred set), and include the same 'A full audit is advised before release.' caution as delta mode. Extend coverageSummary so budget-deferred units are counted as a distinct 'not audited (budget)' category — NOT folded into excluded_file_count (which means intentionally non-auditable). Surface this distinct count in the report model summary so audit-findings.json reflects partial coverage truthfully.

CROSS-REFERENCES (outside the three in-scope files; handle in implement phase): add the budget field to SessionConfig (shared/src/types/sessionConfig.ts, coordinate with FINDING-005/008); ensure the coverage_matrix producer (extractors/coverage building) marks budget-deferred units with a status distinguishable from 'excluded' and 'complete' (e.g. 'deferred' or 'not_audited') so coverageSummary can count them; update the host-facing dispatch step prompt if it states 'dispatch every packet'.

tests_to_write.name: coverage budget limits dispatch to the top-K packets
assertions: With a fixture yielding N>K packets and a configured budget K, prepareDispatchArtifacts emits exactly K plan entries (the highest-priority packets) and records the deferred packets/task_ids.
With no budget configured, all N packets are emitted (today's behavior is unchanged).
The budget composes with the canary: the canary is one of the K, not additive beyond the budget.

tests_to_write.name: synthesis reports sampled coverage honestly
assertions: A report built with a 'sample'/'budget' scope includes a Scope and Coverage notice that the audit is partial (top-K of N), lists at least one un-audited unit, and advises a full audit before release.
coverageSummary reports a non-zero budget-deferred count that is NOT counted as excluded_file_count, and the report-model summary surfaces it.
A full (non-sampled) run produces the existing 'completed audit' wording with zero budget-deferred units.

tests_to_write.name: budgeted run advances to synthesis without looping for the remainder
assertions: When sampling is active and the top-K packets have results, the dispatch obligation is treated as satisfied-for-budget so the run can proceed to synthesis.
When sampling is inactive, the obligation still requires every packet (no regression).
